introSection: Chip 'n' Dale's Gadget Coaster is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride is based on the work of the popular character Gadget Hackwrench from the 1989 Walt Disney Television Animation cartoon, Chip 'n Dale Rescue Rangers.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders.

fullText:
Chip 'n' Dale's Gadget Coaster is a Vekoma roller coaster located at Disneyland Park in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride is based on the work of the popular character Gadget Hackwrench from the 1989 Walt Disney Television Animation cartoon, Chip 'n Dale Rescue Rangers.



Single train with 8 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders.
